monitors.monitor_removed_body: The monitor for <#{{monitor_id}}> was removed. Any threads watched by this monitor will continue being watched

info.title: Information
info.description:
Thread-Watcher is a Discord bot that is designed to help communities get the most out of Discord threads. From keeping threads alive indefinitely, to ticket workflows, Thread-Watcher is your thread tool-box. The bot is 100% open source.

**Running on shard {{shard_id}} of {{shard_count}} | {{guild_count}} servers | {{watched_threads}} watched threads**

### Features

🧵 **Thread Watching**: Prevent threads from being hidden automatically. Watch individual threads or entire channels at once.
👁️ **Channel Monitors**: Automatically watch new threads in a channel, forum, category, or the whole server based on configurable filters.
🎫 **Ticket Panels**: Build custom support ticket flows with a visual pipeline editor. AI-powered issue narrowing, transcripts, and summaries included.

### Useful Links

🔐 **[Privacy Policy](https://threadwatcher.xyz/policies/privacy-policy)**
📋 **[Terms of Service](https://threadwatcher.xyz/policies/terms-of-service)**
✨ **[Documentation](https://docs.threadwatcher.xyz/)**
💬 **[Support Server](https://botsuite.co/join)**
⭐ **[Vote on Top.gg](https://top.gg/bot/870715447136366662/vote?guild_id={{guild_id}})**

advanced.edit_mode: Edit Mode: current monitor will be overwritten
advanced.regex_helper:
**Regex (Regular Expression) Tips**
Regex lets you match thread names using patterns. Here are some simple examples to get started:

> **Match threads containing a word:**
> \`._bug._\` → Matches threads with "bug" anywhere in the name (e.g., "report-bug", "bug fix").
> \`^help\` → Matches threads **starting with** "help" (e.g., "help-me", "help-desired").

> **Match exact phrases:** > \`^bug report$\` → Matches _only_ threads named exactly "bug report".

> **Exclude threads:**
> Add \`!\` at the start to invert the match (e.g., \`!._wip._\` ignores threads with "wip").

📖 **[Full Regex Guide](https://docs.threadwatcher.xyz/usage/advanced-filtering#regex)**
✨ **[AI Regex Generator](https://rgx.tools/)** (External)
🔗 **[Regex Cheat Sheet](https://www.rexegg.com/regex-quickstart.html)** (External)
💡 _Need help? Try your pattern with the **Test Regex** button!_
